Source URL: https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Services.asp

# UH APEX Accelerator Services

## Resource type
APEX services detail.

## Resource summary
Use for procurement consulting, procurement training, registrations/certifications education, government market research, solicitation assistance, accounting-system requirements, and event/speaker participation. Service area listed as 28 Southeast Texas counties including Harris, Fort Bend, Waller, Montgomery, Brazoria, Galveston, and others.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
